headline: Enphase Energy Shares Climb On Push Into Next-Gen Power Electronics
summary: Enphase Energy shares are trading higher in Wednesday's pre-market as buyers lean into the company's push toward next-gen power electronics.

headline: Enphase Energy's Momentum Score Nearly Doubled As Traders Eye A Potential Breakout
summary: Enphase Energy momentum score jumped 41.24 to 87.51 as it unveils GaN BDS tech improving efficiency, power density and future growth outlook.
